inputs.label: Availability (%)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of actual production time to planned production time, expressed as a percentage. Higher availability indicates less downtime.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of actual production time to planned production time, expressed as a percentage. Higher availability indicates less downtime.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiili üretim süresinin planlanan üretim süresine oranı, yüzde olarak ifade edilir. Yüksek kullanılabilirlik daha az duruş süresini gösterir.

inputs.label: Performance (%)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of actual output to theoretical maximum output during actual production time, expressed as a percentage. Accounts for speed losses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of actual output to theoretical maximum output during actual production time, expressed as a percentage. Accounts for speed losses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiili üretim süresinde fiili çıktının teorik maksimum çıktıya oranı, yüzde olarak ifade edilir. Hız kayıplarını hesaba katar.

inputs.label: Quality (%)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of good units produced to total units started, expressed as a percentage. Reflects defect rate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of good units produced to total units started, expressed as a percentage. Reflects defect rate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretilen iyi ürünlerin başlatılan toplam ürüne oranı, yüzde olarak ifade edilir. Hata oranını yansıtır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
